common.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

about.title: The
about.subtitle: The Claude Codex is a community guide to democratize Claude Code. Free, open-source, no intrusive tracking.
about.missionTitle: Making Claude Code accessible to everyone
about.missionDescription: A complete, pragmatic and accessible guide, written for beginners and experts alike.
about.missionP1: Claude Code transforms how we develop, learn and create. But the official documentation, even good, remains technical and scattered.
about.missionP2: The Claude Codex gathers in one place the best practices, community feedback, step-by-step guides and concrete examples.
about.missionP3: For developers who want to master the tool, non-developers who want to get started, and teams looking to adopt Claude Code at scale.
about.valueFreeDesc: No paywall, no signup. The site's source code is open on GitHub, the documentation is under a free license.
about.valueForAllDesc: Seasoned developer, student, non-technical entrepreneur: the guide adapts to your level and use cases.
about.valueIndependentDesc: No disguised commercial partnership, no hidden sponsoring. We write what we think is useful, full stop.
about.valueFrenchDesc: The guide is designed in French with a careful English translation. Because French-speaking tech deserves quality resources.
about.authorRole: Fullstack developer, passionate about AI and developer tooling
about.authorP1: I use Claude Code daily and wanted to share what I learn. This site is the result of hundreds of hours of iteration, testing and community discussions.
about.authorP2: The code, content and structure are freely accessible. If you want to contribute, fix an inaccuracy or suggest an improvement, PRs are welcome.
about.ctaDescription: The guide is ready. Pick the path that fits and dive in.

recent.title: Latest articles
recent.subtitle: The most recent additions to the Codex.

footer.description: The free reference guide to master Claude Code. Created by the community, for the community. No paywall, no tracking, just shared knowledge.

hero.title: Master
hero.subtitle: The reference guide to harness the full power of AI in your daily work. Whether you're a developer, entrepreneur or simply curious, it all starts here.
hero.terminalPrompt: Build me a modern website with a landing page,
hero.terminalPrompt2: an authentication system and an admin dashboard.
hero.terminalResponse: Sure! I'll create your project step by step...

features.title: What you can do with Claude Code
features.description: Claude Code is not just a chatbot. It's a creative partner that understands your context and acts in your environment.

audience.title: No matter your profile, Claude Code is made for you
audience.description: AI is no longer reserved for engineers. Every creative, ambitious or simply curious person can benefit from it.

paths.title: Choose your path
paths.description: Three paths adapted to your level. Start where you are, progress at your own pace.

configurator.title: Your custom setup in 2 minutes
configurator.description: No need to read everything. Answer a few questions and get a personalized configuration, ready to use.

cta.title: Ready to transform the way you
cta.description: The guide is free, open-source and built to last. Start now and join a community that pushes the boundaries of what's possible.

createWebsite.title: Create a website
createWebsite.description: From landing page to full e-commerce, Claude Code generates, structures and deploys your web projects.

generateDocs.title: Generate documents
generateDocs.description: Reports, presentations, technical documentation: let AI structure and write for you.

automate.title: Automate your tasks
automate.description: Scripts, CI/CD pipelines, data migrations. Turn hours of work into minutes.

analyzeData.title: Analyze data
analyzeData.description: Connect your sources, explore your datasets and get insights in natural language.

codeNoDev.title: Code without being a dev
codeNoDev.description: Describe what you want in plain language. Claude Code translates your ideas into working code.

designUI.title: Design interfaces
designUI.description: Create modern and accessible interfaces by simply describing your vision.

connectTools.title: Connect your tools
connectTools.description: With MCPs, integrate Gmail, Slack, GitHub, databases and much more.

deploy.title: Deploy to production
deploy.description: Docker, CI/CD, monitoring: Claude Code handles your infrastructure from A to Z.

developers.title: Developers
developers.description: Accelerate your workflow 10x. Code review, refactoring, automated tests, assisted debugging. Your ultimate copilot.

entrepreneurs.title: Entrepreneurs
entrepreneurs.description: Launch your MVP in days instead of weeks. Prototype, iterate and deploy without a tech team.

creatives.title: Creatives & Designers
creatives.description: Transform your mockups into living websites. Generate animations, custom UI components.

students.title: Students
students.description: Learn by doing. Claude Code explains every concept, fixes your mistakes and guides you step by step.

curious.title: Curious & Self-taught
curious.description: Explore the world of code without prerequisites. Ask questions, experiment, create your first projects.

teams.title: Teams & Managers
teams.description: Standardize your workflows, auto-document, and give superpowers to your entire team.

beginner.title: The fundamentals
beginner.description: Never used Claude Code? Perfect. We start from zero, together.
items: Understand the terminal and the basics
Your first guided project step by step

intermediate.title: Tool mastery
intermediate.description: You know how to use Claude Code? Discover MCPs, Skills and advanced prompting.
items: Connect your favorite tools via MCPs
Prompting techniques that make a difference

advanced.title: Expert & Architect
advanced.description: Push Claude Code to its limits. Multi-agents, complex workflows, deployments.

configuratorTeaser.title: Configure your
configuratorTeaser.description: Answer a few simple questions and get a personalized Claude Code setup: recommended MCPs, generated CLAUDE.md file, and tips tailored to your profile.

metadata.siteDescription: The free reference guide to master Claude Code. MCP, Skills, Advanced Prompting, for developers and non-developers.

notFound.subtitle: This page doesn't exist or has been moved. Whobee has a few ideas to help you find your way.

future.why-ai-matters: AI and the future of development

limits.title: Limits
limits.when-not-to-use: When NOT to use Claude Code

designSystem.metaDescription: Internal reference page for the Claude Codex C1 tokens: typography, palettes, surfaces, callouts, radius, shadows and motion.

hero.title: Claude Codex design system
hero.subtitle: This page lists every visual token of the site. It is the reference for developers and designers when checking that a new component reuses the existing system.
hero.notice: Page not listed in public navigation. Indexing disabled. Always prefer a semantic token over a hard-coded value.

typography.title: Type scale
typography.description: All utility classes are defined in globals.css. They encode size, line-height, weight and the semantic color of each text role.

sample.cc-lead: Lead paragraph that gently introduces the reader to the content.
sample.cc-body: Standard body copy for everyday content.
sample.cc-body-sm: Smaller body text, for notes or longer captions.

palettes.title: Primitive colors
palettes.description: Eleven steps per palette, exposed both as CSS variables and Tailwind utilities. Components should only reach for these hex values in documented edge cases.

semantic.title: Semantic colors
semantic.description: Components should consume these tokens first. They switch automatically between light and dark via the .dark class.

surfaces.title: Three surface levels
surfaces.description: page → subtle → elevated. The .cc-surface-* utilities handle background, text color and the optional shadow at once.
surfaces.subtleUsage: Softer background to break up sections.

status.title: Status colors
status.description: The four standard statuses. Always pair the color with a label to stay accessible to color-blind users.

cards.title: Semantic card
cards.description: The .cc-card class sets a consistent background, border, radius and shadow. Adding data-interactive="true" enables the hover lift.
cards.staticDescription: Standard presentation card, no interaction. Used for informational content.
cards.interactiveDescription: Hover this card to see the elevation and the brand glow.

callouts.title: Semantic callouts
callouts.description: Four variants for MDX. Border and text colors meet AA contrast in both light and dark.

info.title: Info
info.body: Neutral block to clarify some context or point to a resource.

tip.title: Tip
tip.body: Positive block to share a best practice or a useful shortcut.

warning.title: Warning
warning.body: Alert block to flag a common pitfall or something to watch out for.

error.title: Error
error.body: Red block for blocking errors or behaviors to avoid.

radius.title: Border radius
radius.description: Seven radius steps to cover every surface, from filled badges to perfect circles.

shadows.title: Depth
shadows.description: Six shadow levels plus two colored glows. Values are retuned in dark mode to stay perceivable on dark backgrounds.

motion.title: Durations and easings
motion.description: Every site transition pulls from these tokens. Prefer ease-out for natural entry, ease-spring for a slight bounce.
motion.hoverBody: 3px upward translation, base duration with an ease-out curve. Disabled when prefers-reduced-motion is active.
motion.reducedMotion: All animations respect prefers-reduced-motion: the translation is removed for users who request it.
